SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-06-2022 - JUDGMENT.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JAN-06-2022 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JAN-06-2022 BY MICHELLE TONG. PLAINTIFF GAYLE HART IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT ARELIOUS WALKER IS PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. PRIOR TO THE HEARING HONORABLE MICHELLE TONG GAVE DISCLOSURE ABOUT CAMPAIGN CONTRIBUTIONS MADE. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: A. DATT. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HART, GAYLE IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT WALKER, ARELIOUS STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
